name: 锯齿爪刀（★） | 狩猎网格
nameZh: 锯齿爪刀（★） | 狩猎网格
descriptionEn: This ivory-handled karambit features brass rivets and saw-tooth ridges, so it cuts on the way in, and tears on the way out. It has been spray-painted using mesh fencing and cardboard cutouts as stencils. A predator is a predator, no matter the environment
descriptionZh: 这把象牙把手的爪子刀搭配了铜钉和锯齿刀背，以达到进刀切割、出刀撕裂的效果。 这把武器以围住的网格和纸板切口为漏字板进行了喷漆。 不管环境怎么变，弱肉强食的法则永远不会改变
